evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my .NET MAUI BarcodeCapture app from Scandit SDK v6 to v7. Here is my current page code-behind: MainPageV6.xaml.cs.
evals.expected_output: The skill replaces the manual CameraSettings/VideoResolution.Auto block with BarcodeCapture.RecommendedCameraSettings, informs the user about the new default ScanIntention.Smart, and notes the composite-codes default change. It does NOT rename BarcodeCapture.Create — the .NET factory is unchanged. Confirms the MauiProgram.cs UseScanditCore + UseScanditBarcode chain is present.

assertions.text: The CameraSettings with VideoResolution.Auto block is removed
The user is informed about the new default ScanIntention.Smart in v7
At least one of the v6→v7 migration guide URLs (https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-6-to-7/ or https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/ios/migrate-6-to-7/) is provided
BarcodeCapture.Create( is preserved (not renamed to something else)
The BarcodeScanned event subscription (or IBarcodeCaptureListener implementation) is preserved
The HandlerChanged overlay-creation pattern is preserved or introduced

evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Scandit .NET MAUI barcode scanning SDK from v7 to v8. What do I need to change in my code?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that .NET MAUI BarcodeCapture has no breaking factory-method changes in v7→v8. Mentions the formal VideoResolution.Auto deprecation, that BarcodeCaptureLicenseInfo is available from 8.4 and SelectionMode from 8.5, and confirms the HandlerChanged overlay pattern is still required.

assertions.text: The skill mentions there are no breaking factory-method changes for .NET MAUI BarcodeCapture in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace BarcodeCapture.Create with new BarcodeCapture(settings) plus AddMode (that is a cross-platform SDK change, not .NET MAUI)
At least one of the v7→v8 migration guide URLs (https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-7-to-8/ or https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/ios/migrate-7-to-8/) is provided
